name: Hey! It's me!
description:
Hi! I'm alive... Ish. 🫶🏻

UPDATE ON ME AND MY LIFE.

I have been dealing with sickness. My daughter was rushed to the hospital due to hers. Then my boys caught it. I caught it. And now my dear hubby is sick! It just won't go away! We're just going around in circles at this point!

I swear, I am still around! I am supporting each and every one of you as much as I can from afar. Janitor/ST is just taking a backseat while I try and get all of us healthy and better.

In our server, we're doing FOUR COLLABS in one, basically! Each of us wenchy wenches are doing collabs. Rose is doing Orcs, Chloe is doing Cookie Daddy's, Milky is doing Halloween, and me? Well, I'm doing age-gap mechanics! Where they're younger than you. Thank you, Rosieeeee for my obsession with Kevin.

Now! Another reason I am here?

One of my friends' friends started a GoFundMe for him! He is currently dealing with cancer, and will start chemo/radiation soon. Once that starts, him and his wife will be driving down to Texas so he can have surgery! While they are doing that, him nor his wife will be working. They have a little boy who is autistic. So with this GoFundMe, it is to ensure that they are taken care of with bills, gas for the drive down, food and things for their little boy. Once he starts his chemo/radiation, they don't know how this will affect him due to this being the SECOND time he has gone through it. So his friend started this for him to ensure that him and his family is taken care of!

Jason's GoFundMe. But he did give me full permission to share it. He is still angry that someone started it, but only because he is a very proud man! Which, same. I'm an extremely proud man! LOL

But that is where everything is at in my life!

i have saw that several of my favorite bot creators are either leaving/taking a step back/on hiatus. I will miss them dearly, and I hope they get the rest/time away that they need! Thinking of you all so much! 🫶🏻

I hope you guys have been doing AMAZING! And I adore you all so much! 💋

I will be back. Soonish. I have a dozen bots to throw at you! I just haven't been writing much so they'll be short and nasty sweet bots.
creator: anawright93
